title: canna lutea var. aurantiaca
intro: Canna lutea var. aurantiaca, also known as Orange Canna or Yellow Canna, is a variety of the Canna lutea plant, a flowering plant native to Central and South America. This plant is known for its bright orange flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Canna lutea var. aurantiaca include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it useful for treating various health conditions. Canna lutea var. aurantiaca can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
